modules.name: CloudBeaver (DBeaver Web) on a disposable EC2 instance
modules.description: This module deploys CloudBeaver (DBeaver web UI) on a small EC2 instance running Docker.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Name prefix for resources.

inputs.name: vpc_id
inputs.description: VPC where CloudBeaver EC2 will be deployed.

inputs.name: subnet_id
inputs.description: Subnet ID for the CloudBeaver EC2 instance (usually a public subnet for direct internet access).

inputs.name: associate_public_ip_address
inputs.description: Whether to assign a public IPv4 to the instance (required for direct browser access without SSM).

inputs.name: allowed_ingress_cidrs
inputs.description: CIDRs allowed to reach CloudBeaver from the internet. Required unless enable_ssm_only=true.

inputs.name: cloudbeaver_image
inputs.description: Docker image for CloudBeaver.

inputs.name: cloudbeaver_port
inputs.description: Port exposed on the EC2 instance for CloudBeaver (container listens on 8978).

inputs.name: postgres_port
inputs.description: Port exposed on the EC2 instance for PostgreSQL (container listens on 5432).

inputs.name: instance_type
inputs.description: EC2 instance type.

inputs.name: architecture
inputs.description: AMI architecture: x86_64 or arm64.

inputs.name: ami_id
inputs.description: Optional AMI ID. If null, the latest Amazon Linux 2023 is used via SSM parameter.

inputs.name: root_volume_gb
inputs.description: Root EBS volume size in GB.

inputs.name: key_name
inputs.description: Optional EC2 key pair name (only needed if you want SSH).

inputs.name: enable_ssh
inputs.description: Whether to open SSH (22) to the instance. Prefer SSM instead.

inputs.name: ssh_ingress_cidrs
inputs.description: CIDRs allowed to SSH (only used if enable_ssh=true).

inputs.name: enable_ssm
inputs.description: Attach IAM permissions for AWS Systems Manager Session Manager.

inputs.name: enable_ssm_only
inputs.description: If true, do not open CloudBeaver inbound from the internet; access via SSM port-forwarding instead.

inputs.name: ttl_minutes
inputs.description: Optional auto-terminate after N minutes. 0 disables. Requires instance_initiated_shutdown_behavior=terminate.

inputs.name: create_eip
inputs.description: Whether to allocate and associate an Elastic IP (stable public IPv4 while the instance exists).

inputs.name: db_access_rules
inputs.description: Variable db_access_rules

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Additional tags.

inputs.name: region
inputs.description: AWS region to deploy resources in.

outputs.name: cloudbeaver_url
outputs.description: Direct URL for browser access (null if enable_ssm_only=true).

outputs.name: ssm_port_forward_command_for_cloudbeaver_access
outputs.description: If enable_ssm=true, use this to access CloudBeaver via SSM (then open http://localhost:<port>).

outputs.name: ssm_port_forward_command_for_postgres_access
outputs.description: If enable_ssm=true, use this to access PostgreSQL via SSM (then open http://localhost:<port>).

modules.name: AWS Elastic Beanstalk
modules.description: Modulo generico para crear una aplicacion y entorno Elastic Beanstalk. La carpeta conserva el nombre ebs por compatibilidad historica, pero el modulo gestiona Elastic Beanstalk, no EBS volumes.

inputs.name: application_name
inputs.description: Elastic Beanstalk application name.

inputs.name: application_description
inputs.description: Elastic Beanstalk application description.

inputs.name: environment_name
inputs.description: Elastic Beanstalk environment name.

inputs.name: solution_stack_name
inputs.description: Elastic Beanstalk solution stack name.

inputs.name: platform_arn
inputs.description: Elastic Beanstalk platform ARN.

inputs.name: tier
inputs.description: Elastic Beanstalk tier.

inputs.name: appversion_lifecycle
inputs.description: Application version lifecycle configuration.

inputs.name: settings
inputs.description: Elastic Beanstalk environment settings.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all supported resources.

modules.name: AWS ECR Repository
modules.description: Modulo reutilizable para crear repositorios de Amazon Elastic Container Registry. Cada ECR repository es el contenedor logico donde se almacenan imagenes Docker/OCI y artifacts.

inputs.name: repositories
inputs.description: Map of ECR repositories to create. Each repository is the ECR container for images and artifacts. Keys are repository names and values override module defaults per repository.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all repositories.

inputs.name: force_delete
inputs.description: Whether to delete the repository even if it contains images.

inputs.name: image_tag_mutability
inputs.description: Tag mutability setting for repositories.

inputs.name: tag_mutability_filters
inputs.description: Default exclusion filters used with *_WITH_EXCLUSION image tag mutability modes.

inputs.name: scan_on_push
inputs.description: Whether ECR scans images after they are pushed.

inputs.name: encryption_type
inputs.description: Encryption type for the repository.

inputs.name: encryption_kms_key
inputs.description: KMS key ARN or alias used when encryption_type is KMS.

inputs.name: lifecycle_policy
inputs.description: Default lifecycle policy JSON. Set null to skip lifecycle policy creation.

outputs.name: repositories
outputs.description: Created ECR repositories keyed by repository name.

modules.name: AWS EKS
modules.description: Modulo reutilizable para crear clusters de Amazon EKS con Auto Mode o managed node groups clasicos. Puede crear roles IAM, crear subnets simples si se solicita, instalar add-ons administrados y configurar access entries.

inputs.name: cluster_name
inputs.description: Name of the EKS cluster.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all supported resources.

inputs.name: kubernetes_version
inputs.description: Kubernetes version for the EKS cluster. Set null to let AWS use its default.

inputs.name: cluster_mode
inputs.description: EKS cluster mode. Use auto for EKS Auto Mode or classic for EKS managed node groups.

inputs.name: authentication_mode
inputs.description: EKS access authentication mode.

inputs.name: bootstrap_cluster_creator_admin_permissions
inputs.description: Whether to grant cluster-admin access to the IAM principal creating the cluster.

inputs.name: bootstrap_self_managed_addons
inputs.description: Whether EKS should bootstrap the default self-managed add-ons during cluster creation. Ignored in auto mode, where it is forced to false.

inputs.name: deletion_protection
inputs.description: Whether deletion protection is enabled for the EKS cluster.

inputs.name: enabled_cluster_log_types
inputs.description: Control plane log types to enable.

inputs.name: encryption_config
inputs.description: Cluster encryption configuration for Kubernetes secrets.

inputs.name: upgrade_policy
inputs.description: EKS upgrade support policy.

inputs.name: subnet_ids
inputs.description: Existing subnet IDs where the EKS cluster and managed node groups will run. Required unless create_subnets is true.

inputs.name: create_subnets
inputs.description: Whether this module should create subnets in vpc_id from vpc_cidr.

inputs.name: vpc_id
inputs.description: VPC ID used when create_subnets is true.

inputs.name: vpc_cidr
inputs.description: Parent VPC CIDR used to generate subnets when create_subnets is true.

inputs.name: subnet_count
inputs.description: Number of subnets to create when create_subnets is true.

inputs.name: subnet_name_suffix
inputs.description: Suffix used for generated subnet Name tags.

inputs.name: subnet_tags
inputs.description: Additional tags applied to generated subnets.

inputs.name: map_public_ip_on_launch
inputs.description: Whether generated subnets map public IPs on launch.

inputs.name: cluster_security_group_ids
inputs.description: Additional security group IDs attached to the EKS cluster control plane.

inputs.name: endpoint_private_access
inputs.description: Whether the private API server endpoint is enabled.

inputs.name: endpoint_public_access
inputs.description: Whether the public API server endpoint is enabled.

inputs.name: public_access_cidrs
inputs.description: CIDR blocks that can access the public API server endpoint.

inputs.name: ip_family
inputs.description: IP family for the Kubernetes network.

inputs.name: service_ipv4_cidr
inputs.description: Kubernetes service IPv4 CIDR. Only valid when ip_family is ipv4.

inputs.name: service_ipv6_cidr
inputs.description: Kubernetes service IPv6 CIDR. Only valid when ip_family is ipv6.

inputs.name: create_cluster_iam_role
inputs.description: Whether to create the EKS cluster IAM role.

inputs.name: cluster_iam_role_arn
inputs.description: Existing EKS cluster IAM role ARN. Required when create_cluster_iam_role is false.

inputs.name: cluster_iam_role_name
inputs.description: Name for the created cluster IAM role. If null, cluster_iam_role_name_prefix is used.

inputs.name: cluster_iam_role_name_prefix
inputs.description: Name prefix for the created cluster IAM role.

inputs.name: cluster_iam_role_permissions_boundary
inputs.description: Permissions boundary ARN for the created cluster IAM role.

inputs.name: cluster_additional_policy_arns
inputs.description: Additional policy ARNs attached to the created cluster IAM role.

inputs.name: create_node_iam_role
inputs.description: Whether to create the EKS node IAM role.

inputs.name: node_iam_role_arn
inputs.description: Existing EKS node IAM role ARN. Required when create_node_iam_role is false.

inputs.name: node_iam_role_name
inputs.description: Name for the created node IAM role. If null, node_iam_role_name_prefix is used.

inputs.name: node_iam_role_name_prefix
inputs.description: Name prefix for the created node IAM role.

inputs.name: node_iam_role_permissions_boundary
inputs.description: Permissions boundary ARN for the created node IAM role.

inputs.name: node_additional_policy_arns
inputs.description: Additional policy ARNs attached to the created node IAM role.

inputs.name: auto_compute_config_enabled
inputs.description: Whether EKS Auto Mode compute is enabled.

inputs.name: auto_node_pools
inputs.description: Built-in EKS Auto Mode node pools to enable.

inputs.name: auto_elastic_load_balancing_enabled
inputs.description: Whether EKS Auto Mode manages load balancing.

inputs.name: auto_block_storage_enabled
inputs.description: Whether EKS Auto Mode manages block storage.

inputs.name: node_count
inputs.description: Default desired node count for the default managed node group.

inputs.name: min_node_count
inputs.description: Default minimum node count for the default managed node group.

inputs.name: max_node_count
inputs.description: Default maximum node count for the default managed node group.

inputs.name: node_group_defaults
inputs.description: Defaults used by managed node groups.

inputs.name: managed_node_groups
inputs.description: EKS managed node groups to create when cluster_mode is classic. If empty, one default node group is created.

inputs.name: cluster_addons
inputs.description: EKS managed add-ons to install in the cluster, keyed by add-on name.

inputs.name: access_entries
inputs.description: EKS access entries and policy associations, keyed by a friendly name.

outputs.name: cluster_certificate_authority_data
outputs.description: Base64 encoded EKS cluster certificate authority data.

outputs.name: cluster_security_group_id
outputs.description: Security group ID created by EKS for the cluster.

outputs.name: cluster_iam_role_arn
outputs.description: IAM role ARN used by the EKS cluster.

outputs.name: node_iam_role_arn
outputs.description: IAM role ARN used by EKS nodes.

outputs.name: subnet_ids
outputs.description: Subnet IDs used by the EKS cluster.

outputs.name: managed_node_groups
outputs.description: Managed node groups keyed by node group name.

outputs.name: cluster_addons
outputs.description: EKS add-ons keyed by add-on name.

modules.name: AWS EKS Add-ons
modules.description: Modulo para instalar add-ons administrados de EKS y, opcionalmente, crear roles IRSA asociados.

inputs.name: cluster_name
inputs.description: Name of the EKS cluster where add-ons are installed.

inputs.name: addons
inputs.description: EKS managed add-ons to install, keyed by add-on name.

inputs.name: oidc_provider_arn
inputs.description: IAM OpenID Connect provider ARN used for IRSA roles.

inputs.name: oidc_issuer_url
inputs.description: EKS cluster OIDC issuer URL used for IRSA trust policies.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to supported resources.

outputs.name: addons
outputs.description: EKS add-ons keyed by add-on name.

outputs.name: irsa_role_arns
outputs.description: IRSA role ARNs keyed by add-on name.

modules.name: AWS RDS
modules.description: Modulo generico para crear una instancia RDS. Puede crear subnet group, security group y parameter group, o usar recursos existentes.

inputs.name: identifier
inputs.description: RDS instance identifier.

inputs.name: engine
inputs.description: Database engine.

inputs.name: engine_version
inputs.description: Database engine version.

inputs.name: instance_class
inputs.description: RDS instance class.

inputs.name: allocated_storage
inputs.description: Allocated storage in GB.

inputs.name: storage_type
inputs.description: Storage type.

inputs.name: storage_encrypted
inputs.description: Whether storage is encrypted.

inputs.name: kms_key_id
inputs.description: KMS key ARN for storage encryption.

inputs.name: username
inputs.description: Master username.

inputs.name: password
inputs.description: Master password when manage_master_user_password is false.

inputs.name: manage_master_user_password
inputs.description: Whether AWS manages the master password in Secrets Manager.

inputs.name: db_name
inputs.description: Initial database name.

inputs.name: subnet_ids
inputs.description: Subnet IDs for a created DB subnet group.

inputs.name: create_db_subnet_group
inputs.description: Whether to create a DB subnet group.

inputs.name: db_subnet_group_name
inputs.description: DB subnet group name to create or use.

inputs.name: db_subnet_group_description
inputs.description: DB subnet group description.
inputs.defaultValue: DB subnet group managed by Terraform.

inputs.name: vpc_id
inputs.description: VPC ID for a created security group.

inputs.name: create_security_group
inputs.description: Whether to create a security group.

inputs.name: security_group_name
inputs.description: Security group name.

inputs.name: security_group_description
inputs.description: Security group description.
inputs.defaultValue: RDS security group managed by Terraform.

inputs.name: security_group_tags
inputs.description: Additional security group tags.

inputs.name: security_group_ingress_rules
inputs.description: Ingress rules for the created security group.

inputs.name: vpc_security_group_ids
inputs.description: Existing security group IDs.

inputs.name: create_parameter_group
inputs.description: Whether to create a DB parameter group.

inputs.name: parameter_group_name
inputs.description: Parameter group name to create or use.

inputs.name: parameter_group_family
inputs.description: Parameter group family.

inputs.name: parameter_group_description
inputs.description: Parameter group description.
inputs.defaultValue: DB parameter group managed by Terraform.

inputs.name: parameters
inputs.description: DB parameters.

inputs.name: multi_az
inputs.description: Variable multi_az

inputs.name: publicly_accessible
inputs.description: Variable publicly_accessible

inputs.name: deletion_protection
inputs.description: Variable deletion_protection

inputs.name: skip_final_snapshot
inputs.description: Variable skip_final_snapshot

inputs.name: final_snapshot_identifier
inputs.description: Variable final_snapshot_identifier

inputs.name: copy_tags_to_snapshot
inputs.description: Variable copy_tags_to_snapshot

inputs.name: backup_retention_period
inputs.description: Variable backup_retention_period

inputs.name: backup_window
inputs.description: Variable backup_window

inputs.name: maintenance_window
inputs.description: Variable maintenance_window

inputs.name: auto_minor_version_upgrade
inputs.description: Variable auto_minor_version_upgrade

inputs.name: allow_major_version_upgrade
inputs.description: Variable allow_major_version_upgrade

inputs.name: enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports
inputs.description: Variable enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports

inputs.name: iam_database_authentication_enabled
inputs.description: Variable iam_database_authentication_enabled

inputs.name: monitoring_interval
inputs.description: Variable monitoring_interval

inputs.name: monitoring_role_arn
inputs.description: Variable monitoring_role_arn

inputs.name: performance_insights_enabled
inputs.description: Variable performance_insights_enabled

inputs.name: performance_insights_kms_key_id
inputs.description: Variable performance_insights_kms_key_id

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all supported resources.

modules.name: AWS Helm Charts
modules.description: Modulo cloud-agnostic para instalar releases Helm y manifiestos Kubernetes adicionales sobre clusters como EKS.

inputs.name: releases
inputs.description: Helm releases to install, keyed by logical name.

inputs.name: extra_manifests
inputs.description: Additional Kubernetes manifests to apply after Helm releases.

outputs.name: releases
outputs.description: Installed Helm releases keyed by logical name.

outputs.name: extra_manifests
outputs.description: Extra Kubernetes manifests keyed by logical name.

modules.name: AWS IAM Roles
modules.description: Modulo para crear IAM Roles reutilizables con trust policy, politicas inline, managed policies e IRSA opcional.

inputs.name: roles
inputs.description: IAM roles to create, keyed by a stable logical name.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all IAM roles unless overridden per role.

outputs.name: roles
outputs.description: IAM roles keyed by logical name.

outputs.name: role_arns
outputs.description: IAM role ARNs keyed by logical name.

outputs.name: role_names
outputs.description: IAM role names keyed by logical name.

modules.name: AWS Secrets Manager
modules.description: Modulo para crear secretos de AWS Secrets Manager y sus versiones iniciales.

inputs.name: secrets
inputs.description: AWS Secrets Manager secrets to create, keyed by secret name.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all Secrets Manager secrets unless overridden per secret.

outputs.name: secret_arns
outputs.description: Secrets Manager secret ARNs keyed by secret name.

outputs.name: secret_names
outputs.description: Secrets Manager secret names keyed by secret name.

modules.name: AWS Load Balancer
modules.description: Modulo generico para crear un Application Load Balancer o Network Load Balancer con security group opcional, target groups, listeners y access logs opcionales.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Load balancer name.

inputs.name: vpc_id
inputs.description: VPC ID.

inputs.name: subnet_ids
inputs.description: Subnet IDs for the load balancer.

inputs.name: load_balancer_type
inputs.description: Load balancer type.

inputs.name: internal
inputs.description: Whether the load balancer is internal.

inputs.name: security_group_ids
inputs.description: Existing security groups to attach.

inputs.name: create_security_group
inputs.description: Whether to create a security group for the ALB.

inputs.name: security_group_name
inputs.description: Security group name.

inputs.name: security_group_description
inputs.description: Security group description.

inputs.name: security_group_tags
inputs.description: Additional security group tags.

inputs.name: security_group_ingress_rules
inputs.description: Ingress rules for the created security group.

inputs.name: security_group_egress_rules
inputs.description: Egress rules for the created security group.

inputs.name: enable_deletion_protection
inputs.description: Enable deletion protection.

inputs.name: drop_invalid_header_fields
inputs.description: Drop invalid HTTP headers.

inputs.name: enable_cross_zone_load_balancing
inputs.description: Enable cross-zone load balancing.

inputs.name: access_logs
inputs.description: Access logs configuration.

inputs.name: target_groups
inputs.description: Target groups keyed by name.

inputs.name: listeners
inputs.description: Listeners keyed by name.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all supported resources.

modules.name: AWS CloudFront
modules.description: Modulo generico para crear una distribucion CloudFront con origins, cache behaviors, certificado, logging y Origin Access Control opcional.

inputs.name: enabled
inputs.description: Variable enabled

inputs.name: aliases
inputs.description: Variable aliases

inputs.name: comment
inputs.description: Variable comment

inputs.name: default_root_object
inputs.description: Variable default_root_object

inputs.name: http_version
inputs.description: Variable http_version

inputs.name: is_ipv6_enabled
inputs.description: Variable is_ipv6_enabled

inputs.name: price_class
inputs.description: Variable price_class

inputs.name: web_acl_id
inputs.description: Variable web_acl_id

inputs.name: origins
inputs.description: CloudFront origins keyed by origin ID.

inputs.name: default_cache_behavior
inputs.description: Default cache behavior.

inputs.name: ordered_cache_behaviors
inputs.description: Ordered cache behaviors.

inputs.name: geo_restriction
inputs.description: Geo restriction configuration.

inputs.name: viewer_certificate
inputs.description: Viewer certificate configuration.

inputs.name: logging_config
inputs.description: Logging configuration.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to the distribution.

modules.name: AWS NAT Gateway
modules.description: Modulo generico para crear NAT Gateways publicos en subnets existentes. Opcionalmente puede crear rutas 0.0.0.0/0 u otro CIDR en route tables existentes.

inputs.name: nat_gateways
inputs.description: NAT gateways to create. Keys are friendly names.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all supported resources.

modules.name: AWS Route53
modules.description: Modulo para crear o consultar hosted zones de Route53, crear records y configurar delegaciones NS.

inputs.name: delegations
inputs.description: Variable delegations

inputs.name: records
inputs.description: Variable records

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Common tags for the module.

inputs.name: zones
inputs.description: Variable zones

outputs.name: zone_ids
outputs.description: Mapa de zone IDs por zone_key.

outputs.name: zone_name_servers
outputs.description: Mapa de name servers por zone_key (solo si se han creado o localizado por nombre).

modules.name: AWS VPC
modules.description: Modulo para crear una VPC nueva o referenciar una existente y, opcionalmente, configurar VPC Flow Logs hacia CloudWatch Logs o S3.

inputs.name: create_vpc
inputs.description: Whether to create a new VPC. If false, vpc_id must be provided.

inputs.name: vpc_id
inputs.description: ID of an existing VPC to use when create_vpc is false.

inputs.name: vpc_cidr
inputs.description: CIDR block for the VPC

inputs.name: create_flow_log
inputs.description: Whether to create a VPC Flow Log

inputs.name: logs_bucket_arn
inputs.description: ARN of the S3 bucket for VPC Flow Logs. Required only when log_destination_type is s3.

inputs.name: log_destination_type
inputs.description: The type of destination for the flow log data. Valid values are cloud-watch-logs or s3.

inputs.name: traffic_type
inputs.description: The type of traffic to log. Valid values are 'ACCEPT', 'REJECT', or 'ALL'.

inputs.name: environment
inputs.description: Environment name

inputs.name: project_name
inputs.description: Name of the project

inputs.name: region
inputs.description: AWS Region

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags to apply to resources

modules.name: AWS S3
modules.description: Modulo generico para crear uno o varios buckets S3 con controles habituales de seguridad y operacion.

inputs.name: buckets
inputs.description: S3 buckets to create. Keys are bucket names.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all buckets.

outputs.name: buckets
outputs.description: S3 buckets keyed by bucket name.

modules.name: AWS S3 Bucket Policy
modules.description: Modulo generico para construir y asociar una bucket policy a un bucket S3. Acepta statements declarativos y documentos JSON existentes para componer una politica final.

inputs.name: bucket
inputs.description: Bucket name or ID.

inputs.name: source_policy_documents
inputs.description: Source policy documents to merge.

inputs.name: override_policy_documents
inputs.description: Override policy documents to merge.

inputs.name: statements
inputs.description: Policy statements to include.

modules.name: Azure App Service
modules.description: Modulo para crear App Service Plans y Linux Web Apps. Es una base Azure para aplicaciones web gestionadas, similar en proposito a Elastic Beanstalk.

inputs.name: service_plans
inputs.description: App Service plans to create. Keys are plan names.

inputs.name: linux_web_apps
inputs.description: Linux Web Apps to create. Keys are app names.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all supported resources.

outputs.name: service_plans
outputs.description: App Service plans keyed by name.

outputs.name: linux_web_apps
outputs.description: Linux Web Apps keyed by name.

modules.name: Azure Container Registry
modules.description: Modulo para crear uno o varios Azure Container Registries.

inputs.name: registries
inputs.description: Azure Container Registries to create. Keys are registry names.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all registries.

outputs.name: registries
outputs.description: Azure Container Registries keyed by name.

modules.name: Azure AKS
modules.description: Modulo para crear clusters AKS con node pool por defecto y node pools adicionales.

inputs.name: clusters
inputs.description: AKS clusters to create. Keys are cluster names.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all supported resources.

modules.name: Azure AKS Add-ons
modules.description: Modulo para instalar extensiones sobre AKS mediante azurerm_kubernetes_cluster_extension.

inputs.name: cluster_id
inputs.description: AKS cluster resource ID where extensions are installed.

inputs.name: extensions
inputs.description: AKS cluster extensions to install, keyed by extension name.

outputs.name: extensions
outputs.description: AKS cluster extensions keyed by name.

modules.name: Azure Container App
modules.description: Modulo para crear una Azure Container App con imagen, secrets, env vars, registry, ingress y dominios custom.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Container App name.

inputs.name: resource_group_name
inputs.description: Resource group name where the Container App is created.

inputs.name: container_app_environment_name
inputs.description: Container App Environment resource Name.

inputs.name: revision_mode
inputs.description: Container App revision mode.

inputs.name: workload_profile_name
inputs.description: Optional workload profile name.

inputs.name: container_name
inputs.description: Container name inside the Container App template.

inputs.name: image
inputs.description: Container image. Defaults to the Azure Container Apps hello world image.

inputs.name: cpu
inputs.description: Container CPU.

inputs.name: memory
inputs.description: Container memory.

inputs.name: command
inputs.description: Optional container command.

inputs.name: args
inputs.description: Optional container arguments.

inputs.name: env
inputs.description: Environment variables for the container, keyed by variable name.

inputs.name: secrets
inputs.description: Container App secrets, keyed by secret name.

inputs.name: registries
inputs.description: Container registries used by the Container App, keyed by logical name.

inputs.name: ingress
inputs.description: Optional ingress configuration.

inputs.name: custom_domains
inputs.description: Custom domains to bind to the Container App, keyed by logical name.

inputs.name: identity
inputs.description: Optional managed identity configuration.

inputs.name: min_replicas
inputs.description: Minimum number of replicas.

inputs.name: max_replicas
inputs.description: Maximum number of replicas.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to the Container App.

outputs.name: custom_domains
outputs.description: Custom domains keyed by logical name.

modules.name: Azure PostgreSQL Flexible Server
modules.description: Modulo para crear PostgreSQL Flexible Servers y bases de datos.

inputs.name: servers
inputs.description: PostgreSQL Flexible Servers to create. Keys are server names.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all servers.

outputs.name: servers
outputs.description: PostgreSQL Flexible Servers keyed by name.

modules.name: Azure RBAC Role Assignment
modules.description: Modulo para crear asignaciones RBAC de Azure sobre scopes existentes para principals ya creados.

inputs.name: role_assignments
inputs.description: Map of RBAC assignments. The key of the map must be unique.

outputs.name: role_assignments
outputs.description: Azure RBAC role assignments keyed by logical name.

outputs.name: role_assignment_ids
outputs.description: Azure RBAC role assignment IDs keyed by logical name.

modules.name: Azure Managed Identity / Workload Identity
modules.description: Modulo para crear managed identities user-assigned, credenciales federadas para workloads y asignaciones RBAC opcionales.

inputs.name: identities
inputs.description: User-assigned managed identities to create, keyed by a stable logical name.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all supported resources unless overridden per identity.

outputs.name: identities
outputs.description: Managed identities keyed by logical name.

outputs.name: client_ids
outputs.description: Managed identity client IDs keyed by logical name.

outputs.name: principal_ids
outputs.description: Managed identity principal IDs keyed by logical name.

outputs.name: role_assignments
outputs.description: Role assignment IDs keyed by identity-assignment name.

modules.name: Azure Helm Charts
modules.description: Modulo cloud-agnostic para instalar releases Helm y manifiestos Kubernetes adicionales sobre AKS u otros clusters.

inputs.name: releases
inputs.description: Helm releases to install, keyed by logical name.

inputs.name: extra_manifests
inputs.description: Additional Kubernetes manifests to apply after Helm releases.

outputs.name: releases
outputs.description: Installed Helm releases keyed by logical name.

outputs.name: extra_manifests
outputs.description: Extra Kubernetes manifests keyed by logical name.

modules.name: Azure Application Insights
modules.description: Modulo para crear un componente de Application Insights, opcionalmente asociado a Log Analytics.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Application Insights component name.

inputs.name: resource_group_name
inputs.description: Resource group name where Application Insights is created.

inputs.name: location
inputs.description: Azure region where Application Insights is created.

inputs.name: application_type
inputs.description: Application Insights application type.

inputs.name: workspace_id
inputs.description: Optional Log Analytics Workspace ID for workspace-based Application Insights.

inputs.name: retention_in_days
inputs.description: Retention period in days.

inputs.name: daily_data_cap_in_gb
inputs.description: Daily data volume cap in GB.

inputs.name: daily_data_cap_notifications_disabled
inputs.description: Whether daily data cap notifications are disabled.

inputs.name: sampling_percentage
inputs.description: Sampling percentage for ingested telemetry.

inputs.name: disable_ip_masking
inputs.description: Whether IP masking is disabled.

inputs.name: local_authentication_disabled
inputs.description: Whether local authentication is disabled.

inputs.name: internet_ingestion_enabled
inputs.description: Whether telemetry ingestion from the public internet is enabled.

inputs.name: internet_query_enabled
inputs.description: Whether querying from the public internet is enabled.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to Application Insights.

modules.name: Azure Log Analytics Workspace
modules.description: Modulo para crear un Log Analytics Workspace reusable para logs, metricas y Application Insights.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Log Analytics Workspace name.

inputs.name: resource_group_name
inputs.description: Resource group name where the workspace is created.

inputs.name: location
inputs.description: Azure region where the workspace is created.

inputs.name: sku
inputs.description: Log Analytics Workspace SKU.

inputs.name: retention_in_days
inputs.description: Data retention period in days.

inputs.name: daily_quota_gb
inputs.description: Daily ingestion quota in GB.

inputs.name: internet_ingestion_enabled
inputs.description: Whether ingestion from the public internet is enabled.

inputs.name: internet_query_enabled
inputs.description: Whether querying from the public internet is enabled.

inputs.name: reservation_capacity_in_gb_per_day
inputs.description: Reservation capacity in GB per day for capacity reservation SKUs.

inputs.name: allow_resource_only_permissions
inputs.description: Whether resource-context permissions are allowed.

inputs.name: local_authentication_disabled
inputs.description: Whether local authentication is disabled.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to the workspace.

modules.name: Azure Monitor Workspace
modules.description: Modulo para crear un Azure Monitor Workspace para escenarios como managed Prometheus.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Azure Monitor Workspace name.

inputs.name: resource_group_name
inputs.description: Resource group name where the workspace is created.

inputs.name: location
inputs.description: Azure region where the workspace is created.

inputs.name: public_network_access_enabled
inputs.description: Whether public network access is enabled.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to the workspace.

outputs.name: default_data_collection_endpoint_id
outputs.description: Managed default Data Collection Endpoint ID.

outputs.name: default_data_collection_rule_id
outputs.description: Managed default Data Collection Rule ID.

modules.name: Azure Key Vault Secrets
modules.description: Modulo para crear un Azure Key Vault y gestionar multiples secretos, o usar un Key Vault existente.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Key Vault name. Required when create_key_vault is true.

inputs.name: resource_group_name
inputs.description: Resource group name for the Key Vault. Required when create_key_vault is true.

inputs.name: location
inputs.description: Azure region for the Key Vault. Required when create_key_vault is true.

inputs.name: tenant_id
inputs.description: Tenant ID for the Key Vault. Defaults to the current Terraform client tenant.

inputs.name: sku_name
inputs.description: Key Vault SKU.

inputs.name: purge_protection_enabled
inputs.description: Whether purge protection is enabled for a created Key Vault.

inputs.name: soft_delete_retention_days
inputs.description: Soft delete retention in days for a created Key Vault.

inputs.name: public_network_access_enabled
inputs.description: Whether public network access is enabled for a created Key Vault.

inputs.name: enabled_for_disk_encryption
inputs.description: Whether the created Key Vault is enabled for Azure Disk Encryption.

inputs.name: create_key_vault
inputs.description: Whether to create a new Key Vault. Set to false to use an existing Key Vault.

inputs.name: existing_key_vault
inputs.description: Existing Key Vault to use when create_key_vault is false.

inputs.name: secrets
inputs.description: Secrets to create in the effective Key Vault, keyed by secret name.

inputs.name: access_policies
inputs.description: Access policies to create when enable_rbac_authorization is false, keyed by logical name.

inputs.name: enable_rbac_authorization
inputs.description: Whether the Key Vault uses Azure RBAC for authorization. Access policies are skipped when true.

inputs.name: enable_current_client_secret_permissions
inputs.description: Whether to add an access policy for the current Terraform client to manage secrets.

inputs.name: current_client_secret_permissions
inputs.description: Secret permissions granted to the current Terraform client when enabled.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to supported resources unless overridden per secret.

outputs.name: secrets
outputs.description: Key Vault secrets keyed by logical name.

modules.name: Azure Application Gateway
modules.description: Modulo para crear Application Gateways HTTP basicos con backend FQDNs. Es la equivalencia Azure mas cercana a un ALB L7.

inputs.name: application_gateways
inputs.description: Application Gateways to create. Keys are gateway names.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all supported resources.

modules.name: Azure DNS Zone
modules.description: Modulo para crear Azure DNS Zones publicas o Private DNS Zones.

inputs.name: zones
inputs.description: DNS zones to create. Keys are friendly names.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to DNS zones.

modules.name: Azure Front Door
modules.description: Modulo para crear Azure Front Door Standard/Premium con profiles, endpoints, origin groups, origins y routes. Es la equivalencia Azure mas cercana a CloudFront.

inputs.name: profiles
inputs.description: Azure Front Door profiles to create. Keys are profile names.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all supported resources.

outputs.name: profiles
outputs.description: Front Door profiles keyed by name.

modules.name: Azure NAT Gateway
modules.description: Modulo para crear NAT Gateways, Public IPs asociadas y asociaciones opcionales con subnets.

inputs.name: nat_gateways
inputs.description: NAT gateways to create. Keys are NAT gateway names.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all supported resources.

modules.name: Azure VNet
modules.description: Modulo para crear una o varias Virtual Networks y sus subnets.

inputs.name: virtual_networks
inputs.description: Virtual networks to create. Keys are VNet names.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all supported resources.

modules.name: Azure Storage Account
modules.description: Modulo para crear Storage Accounts y containers con defaults seguros.

inputs.name: storage_accounts
inputs.description: Storage accounts to create. Keys are storage account names.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.description: Tags applied to all storage accounts.

outputs.name: containers
outputs.description: Storage containers keyed by storage-account-container name.
